Title: Establishes bicycle with electric assist safety courses and requiring purchasers of bicycles with electric assist to provide a bicycle with electric assist safety certificate
Summary: Establishes bicycle with electric assist safety courses; requires purchasers of bicycles with electric assist to provide a bicycle with electric assist safety certificate at the time of purchase; requires operators of bicycles with electric assist to carry identification when operating such bicycles.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to establishing bicycle with electric assist safety courses, requiring purchasers of bicycles with electric assist to provide a bicycle with electric assist safety certificate and requiring operators of bicycles with electric assist to carry identification when operating such bicycles
